EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.name} from host {src.host} changed account parameters on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} from host {src.host} changed their account parameters on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} from host {src.host} changed account parameters of user {object.account.fullname} on host {event_src.host}
